# waggle_hypervisors (Data Source)

Fetches a hypervisors data source.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cpu_bookable` (Number)
- `cpu_reserved` (Number)
- `cpu_total` (Number)
- `cpu_used` (Number) vCPU allocated to existing guests (from discovery).
- `created_at` (String)
- `datacenter_id` (String)
- `disk_gb_bookable` (Number)
- `disk_gb_reserved` (Number)
- `disk_gb_total` (Number)
- `disk_gb_used` (Number) Disk (GB) allocated to existing guests (from discovery).
- `name` (String)
- `ram_gb_bookable` (Number)
- `ram_gb_reserved` (Number)
- `ram_gb_total` (Number)
- `ram_gb_used` (Number) RAM (GB) allocated to existing guests (from discovery).
- `schedulable` (Boolean) When false, placement excludes this hypervisor.
- `updated_at` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `last_synced_at` (String)
